overall_status: all metrics verified — no mismatches detected
corrections_detail: No metric exceeded the 20% deviation threshold when compared against period-appropriate web sources. Revenue showed the largest deviation (~18%) but this is explained by the Q3-vs-full-FY2026 timing gap and revenue is not stored as a direct field in facts bundles.
data_quality_notes: Facts report period is 2025-10-26 (Q3 FY2026). Web sources citing Jan 2026 (full FY2026) will naturally show slightly higher margins and revenue due to the strong Q4 FY2026 ($39.3B revenue).

ROA and ROE show wide variance across web sources (51% to 124%) depending on whether they use TTM net income vs annual and beginning vs average equity/assets. Period-matched sources validate our values.
No margin > 100% anomalies detected. Net margin 52.7% and operating margin 59.0% are plausible for NVIDIA in FY2026.
PE ratio is positive and reasonable for a profitable growth company — no data bug detected.
